rule.descr: Internet Access to All LAN Connectivity
Default allow LAN to any rule
Default allow LAN IPv6 to any rule
Full Access to All Sub Networks
Full Access to All Sub Networks
Blocking Access to Any Restricted Networks
Blocking Access to Any Restricted Networks
Blocking Network Connectivity from other Networks
Blocking Access to Any Restricted Networks
Blocking Network Connectivity from other Networks
Full Access to All Sub Networks
Blocking Network Connectivity from other Networks

revision.description: admin@192.168.254.69 (Local Database): Firewall: Rules - saved/edited a firewall rule.

package.name: Tailscale
package.descr: Tailscale is a mesh VPN alternative, based on WireGuard, that connects your computers, databases, and services together securely without any proxies.
